title: lotus siliquosus subsp. bivonaeus
intro: Lotus siliquosus subsp. bivonaeus, also known as the Mediterranean lotus or Bivona's lotus, is a subspecies of perennial aquatic plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lotus siliquosus subsp. bivonaeus include potential applications in the treatment of various conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Lotus siliquosus subsp. bivonaeus is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
